# Pull Request

Thanks for contributing to `mcp-service`!

## What does this change?

<!-- A short description of the change. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- Link any related issue numbers, e.g. `Fixes #42` -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing usage to change)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md) and followed the version policy
- [ ] I have added tests covering my change (or explained why not in the PR body)
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally: `pytest`
- [ ] Coverage has not decreased (`coverage report --fail-under=85`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`, `CHANGELOG.md`) where relevant
- [ ] I have updated the OpenAPI schema examples if I changed an HTTP route
- [ ] I have not introduced any new lint / type errors

## How was it tested?

<!-- Describe the verification steps you ran. Screenshots or curl transcripts welcome. -->
